allow: PowerShell($body = '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"ProductInterface\\"\) { fields { name } } }"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://omekotitel.bg/graphql" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data['data']['__type']['fields']]")
